description: Create a UML Use Case diagram for the 'SecureHub' IoT system based on the requirements file provided at '~/Desktop/iot_requirements.txt'. The diagram must include a system boundary labeled 'SecureHub System' containing use cases 'Arm/Disarm System', 'View Camera Feed', 'Unlock Door', 'Manage Access Codes', 'Trigger Panic Alarm', 'Sync Logs', 'Authenticate User', and 'Notify Police'. Position actors 'Homeowner', 'Guest User', 'Emergency Services', and 'Cloud Backend' outside the boundary with relevant associations. Incorporate <<include>> relationships where 'Unlock Door' and 'Arm/Disarm System' include 'Authenticate User', and an <<extend>> relationship where 'Notify Police' extends 'Trigger Panic Alarm'. Save the source file as '~/Desktop/securehub_usecase.drawio' and export a PNG image to '~/Desktop/securehub_usecase.png'.
